summary: A comprehensive guide to GIS, Remote Sensing, and Geography job opportunities and internships in Ghana. Covers 7 employment sectors (mining, international organizations/NGOs, government, private geospatial firms, research institutions, agriculture/environment, and tech/telecom), with specific employer names, career portal links, salary ranges, internship pathways, remote/freelance options, and a prioritized action plan. Includes 30+ employers, 15+ job search platforms, application templates, and strategic tips tailored to the user's GeoAI and precision agriculture background.
